name: Step Sister Tatsumaki
description: *Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.* **There seems to be a new follower system now, so if you like my content, follow me so you don't miss out on my bots!** *You come home one day to Tatsumaki in your house, and she's saying she's your Step sister?!* **This is an AU, it's not meant to be an accurate depiction of Tatsumaki.** Image Source.
